Meta.title: Kelvin — The Mac Menu Bar Multi-Tool
Meta.description: Power, fans, toggles, keyboard layout, privacy and developer tools — all in one native macOS menu bar panel. Monitoring is free forever, Pro is a one-time $19.

Hero.title: One multi-tool instead of ten utilities
Hero.lead: Power, fans, quick toggles, auto keyboard layout, privacy and developer tools — in a single native menu bar panel. On-device. No telemetry.
Hero.micro: Monitoring is free forever · Pro is a one-time purchase, no subscription · macOS 11+ · Intel & Apple Silicon

power.title: Power at a glance
power.desc: Charge ring, live drain graph and an interactive SMC power-flow diagram — see exactly where every watt and amp goes.

fans.title: Fan control
fans.desc: Profiles: fixed RPM, sensor-based curve, auto. Thermal protection. System daemon installs in one click.

toggles.title: Quick toggles
toggles.desc: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Night Shift, dark mode, keyboard backlight — plus your own custom command buttons. Fully customizable tile.

layout.title: Auto layout RU↔EN
layout.desc: A local replacement for Punto Switcher: fixes wrong keyboard layout and hotkey switching — no cloud, no telemetry.

security.title: Privacy & firewall
security.desc: Built-in ALF, panic inbound block, domain blocking, quarantine and Gatekeeper — manage it all in a couple of clicks.

dev.title: For developers
dev.desc: Homebrew, IDEs and libraries from the menu. Screen resolution switch, Finder toggles, CPU/RAM monitoring in the menu bar.

Compare.title: Free forever — pay only to take control
Compare.sub: See everything for free. Pro unlocks the ability to control and automate.

free.name: Free
features: Live readouts right in the menu bar
Wi-Fi / Bluetooth / Night Shift / theme toggles

Showcase.title: Native design in the spirit of Control Center
Showcase.desc: Glass tiles, continuous corners, soft shadows and micro-animations. Light and dark themes. The panel is yours to assemble — which blocks to show and in what order.

Pricing.title: Simple pricing
features: 14 days of full access free — no card
Pricing.micro: Payments and licensing via Lemon Squeezy (Merchant of Record). Cards, Apple Pay, PayPal. Receipts and VAT handled by the store.

Privacy.title: On-device. No tracking.
Privacy.note: Kelvin was built as a local alternative to utilities that phone home. Privileged actions (daemons, firewall) request your password through the standard macOS dialog — transparent and under your control.

items.a: No. Kelvin Pro is a one-time $19 purchase. There are no subscriptions or recurring charges. Major versions in the future may be a paid upgrade at a discount for existing owners.

items.q: How many Macs does one license cover?
items.a: Two computers. You can deactivate the license on one Mac and transfer it to another — for example, when replacing or selling hardware.
All monitoring — forever: battery, wattage, temperatures, fans, load, menu bar readouts and basic toggles. Pro adds control and automation.

items.q: Does it work on Apple Silicon (M-series)?
items.a: Yes, on both Intel and Apple Silicon, macOS 11 and later. The set of sensors and GPU switching depend on the model — Kelvin only shows what's available on your Mac.
Yes, within 14 days — plus the free trial unlocks all Pro features for 14 days before you buy.

items.q: Why not on the Mac App Store?
items.a: Fan control, charge limiting, firewall and system daemons are incompatible with the App Store sandbox. That's why Kelvin is distributed directly — as a notarized DMG that passes Apple's Gatekeeper checks.

Download.title: Download
Download.lead: Free for macOS 11+. Pro unlocks right inside the app.
Download.micro: Notarized by Apple. On first use of Pro features, macOS will ask for permission in System Settings → Privacy & Security.
